窗外传来了雨滴的声音。(The sound of raindrops came from outside the window.)
我和朋友约好星期六一起去公园。(I made an appointment with my friend to go to the park together on Saturday.)
海边的浪花一波又一波。(The waves at the seaside come one after another.)
我们不应该浪费食物。(We should not waste food.)
小河的水静静地流着。(The stream's water flows quietly.)
这两根绳子连接在一起。(These two ropes are connected together.)
奶奶用针线缝补衣服。(Grandma mends clothes with needle and thread.)

p2-19.english: to break, to cut, to interrupt
p2-19.definition-english: To break; to cut; to interrupt
p2-19.sentence: 风筝的线突然断了。(The kite's string suddenly broke.)
我们来猜猜这个谜语的答案。(Let's guess the answer to this riddle.)

p2-19.english: to shake, to wave, to rock
p2-19.definition-english: To shake; to wave; to rock
p2-19.sentence: 小狗看到我，开心地摇着尾巴。(The puppy wagged its tail happily when it saw me.)
跑完步后，我觉得很渴。(After running, I felt very thirsty.)
小明在班上考试的分数比较低。(Xiao Ming's exam score in class is relatively low.)
